title: eugenia retusa
intro: Eugenia retusa, also known as the Philippine tea olive or Mountain apple, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to the Philippines and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a natural diuretic and to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and colds. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to promote overall health and well-being, with benefits including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Eugenia retusa can be prepared as a tea or infusion, which is often consumed hot or cold, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
